definition: A runnable registry component exists for this mechanism and was executed to produce the row's other cells.
No runnable component; the row is a placeholder recording why (see params_provenance) and what would unblock it.
The mechanism is compared against the SAME physical observable it predicts (e.g. extraction fraction vs extraction fraction).
The available comparison is against a DIFFERENT observable than the mechanism natively predicts; agreement or disagreement is only suggestive.
No same-dataset observable exists; a proxy quantity from a different dataset stands in (weakest observable link).
The mechanism cannot be evaluated at all because required parameters are unpublished (see BLOCKED_INTAKE.md).
Parameters are fixed from published literature values and NOT fitted to any trace in this study.
Parameters are transferred from another dataset in the same research campaign (not this exact trace; soft-circular).
One or more parameters were least-squares fitted to the very target the mechanism is then scored against (in-sample).
Required parameters are unpublished so no provenance can be assigned.
The mechanism CAN generate an interior maximum (a peaked grind response) as a matter of model capacity -- a capability statement, not a validated prediction.
An interior maximum appears ONLY when a parameter is pushed beyond its measured value (e.g. rho_c doubled); not at measured parameters.
The mechanism monotonically fails to produce an interior maximum under its stated assumptions.
Not evaluated because the mechanism is not implemented / parameter-blocked.
Rung: independent -- a distinct measured quantity constrains the mechanism (ROADMAP Sec 0 validation vocabulary).
Rung: qualitative -- the mechanism qualitatively CAN produce the effect (capacity) but is not quantitatively validated.
Rung: qualitative -- a null/baseline whose qualitative behaviour is consistent with the data but carries no discriminating power.
No evidence rung assigned: the mechanism is not implemented.
